description: crest - about mt. bluebird size, yellow band on end of tail, tan to gray back, gold belly, velvet look, touch of white on wing, black eye line. No full frontal view.Behaviors: At bird water. 50 feet from window, viewed for 5 minutes. Second individual arrived. Brief copulation.  This at 8,360 ft altitude - drier and higher than expected breeding of this species.  Dg. Fir and Ponderosa Pine - open slope - few junipers, plus ground juniper and wax currant.Call: not heardPlumage: Spring
